name: worldcuproomiebet
changelog: Excluded knockout matches from temporary client-side points calculations to prevent incorrect leaderboard scoring 🛡️
Added visual Pending Lock indicator and hourglass icons for completed but unlocked match guesses ⏳🔒
Auto-clears extra time and shootout predictions when changing a prediction to a regular-time win 🧹
Fixed blank/empty draw predictions defaulting safely to regular-time scores instead of NaN parsing 🛠️
Released updated Firestore security rules to allow regular users to clear scheduled predictions cleanly 🔒
Add version history in user menu
Simplified placeholder texts in extra time and shootout inputs to simply Home and Away ✍️
Improved detailed predictions listing on mobile to wrap names (left-aligned) and scores (right-aligned) cleanly 📱
Added Don't show again checkbox inside the Scoring Rules modal, persisting your preference across reloads 📋
Refined Regular Time flex spacing and optimized cards layout down to 320px screens 📱
Added Knockout Scoring Rules explanation modal, accessible anytime via the user avatar menu 📋
Group stage matches are now collapsed into a clean historical link when the Knockout Stage starts 📂
Predictions are formatted cleanly with Correct segments highlighted in Gold, centered penalties brackets, and ET early exit suppression ✨
Leaderboard layout updated to stack player names and subscript points logically 👤
Overlayed prediction labels on card borders and optimized inputs spacing for easier entry on all devices (down to 320px) 📱
Integrated Round of 32 knockout stage features (extra-time, penalty shootouts) ⚽
Added split leaderboard tabs (Overall, Group Stage, and Knockout Stage) 📊
Added support for knockout match scoring, dynamic team resolution, and player point calculations ⚙️
Implemented admin dashboard setup options for user visibility toggles and database cleanup 🔧
Added collapsible changelog list directly to the version update notification banner 📜
Implemented Forgot Password functionality with automated email reset flow 📧
Added team name mapping normalization support for Bosnia & Herzegovina 🇧🇦
Enhanced app security by moving database configuration keys to secure environment variables 🔒
